source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: jim4 jit6 dik1 jat1 tin1
cards.english: [Very Hot Day]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 陽光普照，今日非常之熱
cards.jyutping: joeng4 gwong1 pou2 ziu3 gam1 jat6 fei1 soeng4 zi1 jit6
cards.english: The sun is shining, it's a very hot day today

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 zan1 hai6 hou2 jit6 aa3
cards.english: It's really hot today

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: tung4 zoek6 zo2 seoi2 haai4
cards.english: Peppa and George are wearing their wellies

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 佢哋打算跳入泥氹度喎
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 daa2 syun3 tiu3 jap6 nai4 tam5 dou6 wo3
cards.english: They're planning to jump into the muddy puddle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 nai4 tam5 gaa4
cards.english: I really like muddy puddles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: gam2 ge2
cards.english: Really?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 因為今日太熱嘅關係，令個泥氹乾咗喇
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 gam1 jat6 taai3 jit6 ge3 gwaan1 hai6 ling6 go3 nai4 tam5 gon1 zo2 laa3
cards.english: Because it's so hot today, the muddy puddle has dried up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 媽咪、爹哋，啲泥氹乾晒啊
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 de1 dei6 di1 nai4 tam5 gon1 saai3 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, Daddy, the muddy puddles are all dried up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dou3 ngo5 tiu3 m4 dou3 jap6 heoi3 aa3
cards.english: Now I can't jump into them.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: m4 gan2 jiu3 laa1
cards.english: It's okay, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: gei3 jin4 gam1 jat6 gam3 jit6
cards.english: Since it's so hot today.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 你可以玩我哋個充氣游泳池㗎
cards.jyutping: nei5 ho2 ji5 waan2 ngo5 dei6 go3 cung1 hei3 jau4 wing6 ci4 gaa4
cards.english: You can play in our inflatable swimming pool.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 jau5 cung1 hei3 jau4 wing6 ci4
cards.english: Yay, an inflatable swimming pool!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 首先，你哋要入去換泳衣
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 nei5 dei6 jiu3 jap6 heoi3 wun6 wing6 ji1
cards.english: First, you guys need to go in and change into your swimsuits.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Okay, Mommy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: tung4 zoek6 zo2 keoi5 dei6 ge3 wing6 ji1
cards.english: Peppa and George have put on their swimsuits.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 豬太太亦着咗自己嘅泳衣
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 jik6 zoek6 zo2 zi6 gei2 ge3 wing6 ji1
cards.english: Mrs. Pig has also put on her swimsuit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 豬先生着咗自己嘅泳褲喎
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 zoek6 zo2 zi6 gei2 ge3 wing6 fu3 wo3
cards.english: Mr. Pig has put on his swimming trunks.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 因為今日好熱，就要搽啲太陽油喇
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 gam1 jat6 hou2 jit6 zau6 jiu3 caa4 di1 taai3 joeng4 jau4 laa3
cards.english: Because it's so hot today, we need to put on some sunscreen.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 jau6 jau4 jau6 hou2 wat6 dat6 aa3
cards.english: It's so oily and disgusting!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 m4 hou2 siu2 tai4 daai6 zou6 laa1
cards.english: Don't make such a big deal out of it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 係啊，今日個個都要搽太陽油
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 gam1 jat6 go3 go3 dou1 jiu3 caa4 taai3 joeng4 jau4
cards.english: Yeah, everyone needs to put on sunscreen today.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1
cards.english: Come on, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 我哋泵啲氣入去個充氣游泳池
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 bam1 di1 hei3 jap6 heoi3 go3 cung1 hei3 jau4 wing6 ci4
cards.english: Let's pump some air into the inflatable pool.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 豬先生幫充氣游泳池泵氣
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 bong1 cung1 hei3 jau4 wing6 ci4 bam1 hei3
cards.english: Mr. Pig is pumping air into the inflatable pool.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1
cards.english: Easy peasy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: fu6 zaak3 ling1 seoi2 hau4
cards.english: Peppa is in charge of getting the hose.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 而豬太太就扭開水龍頭
cards.jyutping: ji4 zyu1 taai3 taai2 zau6 nau2 hoi1 seoi2 lung4 tau4
cards.english: And Mrs. Pig turns on the faucet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: dim2 gaai2 mou5 seoi2 ge2
cards.english: Why is there no water?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: Peppa同George好鍾意個充氣游泳池啊
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 go3 cung1 hei3 jau4 wing6 ci4 aa3
cards.english: Peppa and George love the inflatable pool.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: syut3 gou1
cards.english: Ice cream!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: tou3 siu2 ze2 lai4 maai6 syut3 gou1 aa3
cards.english: Miss Rabbit is here selling ice cream.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: syut3 gou1
cards.english: Ice cream!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 喺好熱嘅日子，兔小姐會賣雪糕
cards.jyutping: hai2 hou2 jit6 ge3 jat6 zi2 tou3 siu2 ze2 wui6 maai6 syut3 gou1
cards.english: On a very hot day, Miss Rabbit sells ice cream.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 de1 dei6
cards.english: Mommy, Daddy,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 我同George可以去買雪糕食嗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 ho2 ji5 heoi3 maai5 syut3 gou1 sik6 maa1
cards.english: Can George and I go buy ice cream?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 好啦，我見今日咁熱，就畀你哋食啦
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 ngo5 gin3 gam1 jat6 gam3 jit6 zau6 bei2 nei5 dei6 sik6 laa1
cards.english: Alright, since it's so hot today, I'll let you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 maai5 dou3 jat1 bui1 bei2 ngo5 maa1
cards.english: Can I buy a cup for myself?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 sik6 syut3 gou1
cards.english: Everyone loves to eat ice cream.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 hou2 maa1
cards.english: Mrs. Pig, Peppa, George, hello

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: tou3 siu2 ze2 nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Miss Rabbit, hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 soeng2 jiu3 me1 syut3 gou1 aa3
cards.english: What kind of ice cream do you all want?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 我可以要雪糕筒嗎？兔小姐
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ho2 ji5 jiu3 syut3 gou1 tung2 maa1 tou3 siu2 ze2
cards.english: Can I have an ice cream cone, Miss Rabbit?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: dong1 jin4 ho2 ji5 laa1
cards.english: Of course you can, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1
cards.english: Thank you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 我同豬先生都要一個雪糕筒吖，唔該
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dou1 jiu3 jat1 go3 syut3 gou1 tung2 aa1 m4 goi1
cards.english: Mr. Pig and I would also like an ice cream cone, please.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 係噉，George又想要啲咩雪糕呢？
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 jau6 soeng2 jiu3 di1 me1 syut3 gou1 ne1
cards.english: Okay, and what kind of ice cream does George want?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: nei5 waa6 hung2 lung4 aa1
cards.english: You said dinosaur?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 so4 aa3
cards.english: George is so silly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 佢無論幾時都淨係識得講「恐龍」㗎咋
cards.jyutping: keoi5 mou4 leon6 gei2 si4 dou1 zing6 hai6 sik1 dak1 gong2 hung2 lung4 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: He only knows how to say "dinosaur" all the time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 gam1 jat6 gam3 ngaam1
cards.english: But, it just so happens today

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 我就係有一條恐龍形狀嘅雪條喺度喎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 hai6 jau5 jat1 tiu4 hung2 lung4 jing4 zong6 ge3 syut3 tiu2 hai2 dou6 wo3
cards.english: As it happens, I have a dinosaur-shaped popsicle here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: George，你要喺雪糕熔之前，快啲食晒佢
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 hai2 syut3 gou1 jung4 zi1 cin4 faai3 di1 sik6 saai3 keoi5
cards.english: George, you need to eat all of your popsicle quickly before it melts.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: Dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 keoi5 tiu4 hung2 lung4 syut3 tiu2
cards.english: George loves his dinosaur popsicle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 鍾意到唔捨得食咗佢啊
cards.jyutping: zung1 ji3 dou3 m4 se2 dak1 sik6 zo2 keoi5 aa3
cards.english: He loves it so much that he can't bear to eat it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 saai3 nei5 aa3 tou3 siu2 ze2
cards.english: Thank you, Miss Rabbit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: waan2 dak1 hoi1 sam1 di1 laa1
cards.english: Have fun!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: George，我覺得你應該快啲食晒條雪條
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gok3 dak1 nei5 jing1 goi1 faai3 di1 sik6 saai3 tiu4 syut3 tiu4
cards.english: George, I think you should eat the popsicle quickly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 jung4 zo2
cards.english: Or it will melt...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: zau6 dit3 lok6 dei6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: It's going to fall on the ground.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: caam2 laa3
cards.english: Oh no, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 條恐龍雪條熔咗，仲跌晒落地啊
cards.jyutping: tiu4 hung2 lung4 syut3 tiu2 jung4 zo2 zung6 dit3 saai3 lok6 dei6 aa3
cards.english: The dinosaur popsicle melted and it all fell on the ground.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: m4 gan2 jiu3 laa1
cards.english: It's okay, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 你可以食少少爹哋個雪糕
cards.jyutping: nei5 ho2 ji5 sik6 siu2 siu2 de1 dei6 go3 syut3 gou1
cards.english: You can eat some of Daddy's ice cream.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 keoi5 m4 gaai3 ji3 ge2
cards.english: I don't think he'll mind.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 今日天氣好好，令豬先生唔覺意瞓着咗
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 tin1 hei3 hou2 hou2 ling6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 m4 gok3 ji3 fan3 zoek6 zo2
cards.english: The weather is so nice today that Mr. Pig accidentally fell asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lok6 de1 dei6 hou2 jit6 wo3
cards.english: Daddy looks very hot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 我哋倒啲水落爹哋度，幫佢降温啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 dou2 di1 seoi2 lok6 de1 dei6 dou6 bong1 keoi5 gong3 wan1 laa1
cards.english: Let's pour some water on Daddy to help him cool down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zyu2 ji3 aa3
cards.english: Good idea, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: me1 si6 aa3
cards.english: What's the matter?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 你頭先好似好熱噉啊，爹哋
cards.jyutping: nei5 tau4 sin1 hou2 ci5 hou2 jit6 gam2 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: You seemed really hot just now, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 所以我哋倒啲水落你度
cards.jyutping: so2 ji5 ngo5 dei6 dou2 di1 seoi2 lok6 nei5 dou6
cards.english: So we poured some water on you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 hai6 gam2 m4 goi1 nei5 aa3
cards.english: Oh, I see. Thank you, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 aa1 dei6 haa6 jau5 seoi2 tam5 aa3
cards.english: Look, there's a puddle on the ground!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
cards.characters: 快啲吖，George，我哋去着水鞋啦
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 aa1 ngo5 dei6 heoi3 zoek6 seoi2 haai4 laa1
cards.english: Hurry, George, let's go put on our wellies!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E40 The Very Hot Day［炎熱的一天］
